name: PARAGANGLIOMA OF SPINAL CORD

demographics.Path: soft encapsulated (75%) slightly hemorrhagic mass supplied by numerous feeding
demographics.Histo: chief cells + sustentacular cells surrounded by fibrovascular stroma; nests of chief cells

discriminating_features: well-circumscribed mass isointense to cord on T1WI
"cap" sign = low-signal-intensity rim on T2WI from hemorrhage

MR: well-circumscribed mass isointense to cord on T1WI
"cap" sign = low-signal-intensity rim on T2WI from hemorrhage
serpentine flow voids along surface + within tumor nodule
ANGIO: intense early blush persisting well into late arterial + early venous phase
